features: ULTIMATE BATHING: Treat yourself to an indulgent bath experience with sweet mandarin & grapefruit scented soaps, body lotion, and shower gel
GORGEOUS GIFT: This large gift set is perfect for pampering loved ones or treating yourself
VEGAN FRIENDLY: All products in this set are vegan-friendly and cruelty-free
WHAT'S INCLUDED? 300 ml body wash, 300 ml bath milk, 100 g soap, 130 ml shower crème, 130 ml body lotion, 100 g bath soak and a body polisher for a complete bathing routine
FRAGRANT BLEND: Enjoy the refreshing aroma of sweet mandarin balanced with zesty grapefruit in each product of this luxurious gift set
description: Product Description The ultimate bathing treats, beautifully packaged in a keepsake box. Our body wash, bath milk, soap, shower crème, body lotion, bath soak crystals and body polisher are elegantly fragranced with our iconic Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit scent. Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients BODY WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 14700 (Red 4).BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 16035 (Red 40).HAND & NAIL CREAM: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.BATH SOAK CRYSTALS: Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.CLEANSING SOAP: Sodium Palmate, Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Tetrasodium Edta, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Start with the body wash or shower creme, lather and rinse. Apply the body lotion to damp skin, massaging it in from head to toe. For a relaxing bath, add the bath soak crystals to running water and soak. Use the body polisher for exfoliation before applying the body lotion. The frequency of application may vary based on personal preference and skin needs. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in the eyes rinse immediately with clean warm water. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use. If irritation persists, consult your doctor. Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
